_comment: CodeGraph lane. Producer runs `codegraph explore <query> -p <clap>` against the pinned, pre-indexed clap clone; qodec re-packs the explore output. The arm is `codegraph+qodec`, not skipped. NOTE: explore output is verbatim source + symbol names + paths — the case where blind qodec risks aliasing spans the reader must copy; the `protected qodec` arm (deferred) is the intended production variant here.

producer.query: How does clap parse arguments against a derived command definition?
